Uses of Package
store

  • Classes in store used by store
    Class
    Description
    FileService
    Defines methods for reading and writing product files.
    FileServiceException
    Custom exception used for file service errors.
    PlayerBag
    Stores items after checkout.
    SalableProduct
    Represents a product that can be sold in the store.
    ShoppingCart
    Stores products the user adds to the cart.
